prerequisites.reason: Opening a replay always requires an opened capture handle.
Remote replay requires a live remote handle in options.remote_id.

rd.vfs.ls.parameter_raw:
path (str, 可选, 默认 '/'): VFS 路径
session_id (str, 可选): 当 path 指向 replay 相关域时用于解析当前 session
projection (dict, 可选): 当 kind='tabular' 时返回 entries 的统一表格摘要
rd.vfs.ls.returns_raw:
ok (bool)
data (dict): {path, node, entries}
projections.tabular (dict, 可选): {format_version, columns, rows, row_count, tsv_text?}
artifacts (list)
error (dict|null)
meta (dict)
